function.name: list_cubes
function.description: List all available data cubes with their name, title, description, and field counts. Call this first to discover what data is available.

function.name: describe_cube
function.description: Get the full field catalog for a cube: all dimensions (with types, descriptions, color maps), all measures (with aggregation type and format), all segments, and cube-level metadata (grain, period, granularity). Call this before generate_dashboard to understand what fields are available.

cube_name.description: The exact cube name from list_cubes results.

function.name: get_chart_support
function.description: List supported chart types with their data slot requirements. Returns which chart types have working renderers and what data fields each requires. Optionally filter by chart family.

family.description: Filter by chart family: category, time, numeric, single, hierarchy, relation, specialized, tabular, control, geo. Null for all families.

function.name: query_cube
function.description: Run a Cube.dev analytics query to answer data questions — check cardinality, date ranges, distributions, top-N values. Use dimension and measure short names (e.g. "region", "count"), not fully qualified names.

dimensions.description: Dimension short names to group by. Empty array for totals only.

measures.description: Measure short names to aggregate. At least one is required.

member.description: Dimension or measure short name to filter on.

filters.description: Filters to apply. Null for no filters.

limit.description: Max rows returned. Default 100, max 1000. Null for default.

order.description: Sort field and direction as "field_name:asc" or "field_name:desc". Null for default order.

function.name: generate_dashboard
function.description: Create or update a dashboard config. Makes a specialized LLM call with the full schema and design guidelines. Returns a guaranteed-valid config and auto-saves it as a draft for preview. For updates, pass current_config: "CURRENT" to modify the last generated config.

cube_name.description: The cube to build the dashboard for. Must match a name from list_cubes.

title.description: Dashboard title, e.g. "Fleet Overview" or "Tourism Patterns".

purpose.description: What the dashboard should show, which dimensions/measures to focus on, and any specific chart preferences. Be detailed — this drives the entire generation.

current_config.description: Pass "CURRENT" to update the last generated config. Pass null to create a new dashboard from scratch.

function.name: save_draft
function.description: Save a dashboard config to the draft file for preview. In most cases generate_dashboard auto-saves, so this is only needed for saving manually edited configs.

source.description: CURRENT: save the last generated config. CUSTOM: save the config provided in custom_config.

custom_config.description: When source is CUSTOM: the full dashboard config as a JSON string. Null when source is CURRENT.
